== Notes for [[Item:Q105352|Q105352]] ==

Juana de MORALES (aka Juana Gutierrez)76,183,1836,2103,2578 was born (date unknown). Marriage Investigation #22-3 gives her name as Juana Gutierrez. Parents: Juan de MORALES Gomez and Isabel GUTIERREZ.

Spouse: Joseph RAMON (Joseph de Morales). Juana de MORALES (aka Juana Gutierrez) and Joseph RAMON (Joseph de Morales) were married about 1648.2103 Children were: Capt. Joseph RAMON, Ildephonsa (Aldonsa) RAMON, Nicolas RAMON, Diego RAMON, Juana RAMON, Maria Jacinta RAMON, Maria RAMON.

http://www.raullongoria.net/Genealogy/FamilyTree/b163.html#P9864

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014332064698

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
